name: loopy
description: A small skill system for turning unstable theory-first coding work into tested survivors.

interface.shortDescription: Turn unstable work into tested survivors
interface.longDescription: Use Loopy to refine theory-first coding claims, then map stable theory into traceable implementation slices through rejection tests until the smallest stable survivor remains.
defaultPrompt: Use loopy:loopy-theory to refine this claim.
Use loopy:loopy-theory to test this theory.
Use loopy:loopy-theory to improve this process rule.
Use loopy:loopy-implement to implement this theory as traceable code slices.
Use loopy:loopy-review to check this implementation slice against its theory.
